title: CityComfort Hot Water Bottle with Cover - Fun 3D Super Soft Fleece Plush Cover Will Keeps Warm for A Long Time - Natural Rubber 1 Litre - UK Safe Tested and Durable (Sloth)
features: ✔ SLOTH HOT WATER BOTTLE : Keep yourself warm and cosy with our super cute hot water bottle with a Sloth design fluffy cover. It's perfect to be used when you want to warm your bed before sleep and also a great and natural remedy for cold feet, back pain, cramps and other more. Can be used as a very funny and thoughtful Christmas gift for adults and teenagers

✔ GREAT FEET OR HAND WARMERS: Incredible thermotherapy that will last for a long time. This hot water bottle sloth is great to put an end to cold feet and cold hands. Also a great help to sooth pain away from minor ailments like sore muscles, back pain, cramps, earaches and toothaches

✔ QUALITY MATERIAL HOT WATER BOTTLE COVER: The hot water bottle cover is made from soft fleece materials for extra comforting feeling you will love. The inner hot water pouch is made from natural rubber and the product is safe and secure

✔ EASY TO USE: This soft hot bottle is the perfect bed warmer: Fill up your hot water bottle up and put it in the bed 10 minute before your bedtime, it will be a super relaxing warm and extra cosy experience. It’s also great on rainy days when it’s not cold enough to be the heating on

✔ GREAT GIFTS FOR ALL THE FAMILY: our 3D water hot water bottle with fleece covers are great gift ideas for all the family. Whether it’s for Christmas gift or for a birthday gift, for your wife, mum, teenagers, dad, father in law or mother in law, we all know someone who could benefit from a warm hot water bottles to help with aches and pains, or just for added comfort. It is also a great idea for christmas stocking fillers for adults
